name_cn:
CARO Handbag M9243
The Caro Handbag is crafted from calfskin, featuring a quilted detail with the iconic diagonal stitching. The back features a debossed "30 Montaigne" logo. Soft material with a vintage gold-finish metal "CD" clasp on the flap, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Large size, equipped with a detachable iconic "CD" chain-link shoulder strap, which can also be replaced with an embroidered wide strap for a more elegant look. Effortlessly suitable for daily wear or evening parties.
Number: M9243
Dimensions: 28 x 17 x 9 cm
